process.name: Widget Lifecycle with Event Wait
process.documentation:
Demonstrates async workflow pattern: 1. Dispatch CreateWidgetCommand via Axon (Story 6.2) 2. Wait for WidgetCreatedEvent from Axon (Story 6.3) 3. Process completes after event confirmation
Required process variables: - widgetId (String): UUID for widget aggregate (also used as business key) - tenantId (String): Tenant identifier - name (String): Widget name - description (String, optional): Widget description - value (BigDecimal): Widget value - category (String): Widget category

serviceTask.name: Create Widget
serviceTask.documentation: Dispatches CreateWidgetCommand to Axon command bus. Widget aggregate applies WidgetCreatedEvent.

intermediateCatchEvent.name: Wait for Widget Created
intermediateCatchEvent.documentation: Pauses process execution until WidgetCreatedEvent is published by Axon. AxonEventSignalHandler correlates event to this process via business key.
